struct_label: Bullish Break + Bearish Break + Neutral Extreme + Neutral + Double Distribution
_tcs_intraday_min_note: Intraday TCS floor added 2026-04-22 (Task #2031). Overrides MIN_TCS (49) for intraday scans only. Hist: TCS>=35 intraday = 98% WR / 107 trades vs 100% WR / 51 at TCS>=50. Unlocks 35-49 band in expanded 200-ticker pool. Live floor (_LIVE_MIN_TCS=70) is never overridden.
